name: kan
tagline: A minimalist self-hosted kanban board for fast and distraction-free task management
description: kan is a minimalist self hosted kanban board for personal or team task management. It provides columns, cards, drag and drop reordering and simple metadata, focusing on speed and a distraction free workflow.

features.title: Terminal Kanban Boards
features.description: Manage kanban boards directly from the command line

features.title: Local Task Storage
features.description: Store boards and tasks in local files

features.title: Offline Usage
features.description: Use the tool without network connectivity

features.title: Simple Workflow
features.description: Move tasks across columns using keyboard commands
